circt.result: ListItem ( ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 4 ) ) ) )

mlir.standard-ops: .OpResults = "builtin.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OpResults = "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %arg1 , %arg0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input xx : i8 , input yy : i8 , output result1 : i8 , output result2 : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc , #loc1 , #loc2 , #loc3 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Swap" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : %0 , %1 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , %arg1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "x" , "y" , .AttributeValueList ] instanceName |-> "swap" moduleName |-> @Swap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "result1" , "result2" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) %2 , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %0 , %1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input a : i8 , input b : i8 , output res : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc4 , #loc5 , #loc6 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Adder" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { .Map } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList
mlir.attr-alias: #loc1 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 31 ) #loc2 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 43 ) #loc3 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 60 ) #loc4 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 21 ) #loc5 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 32 ) #loc6 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 44 ) #loc |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 20 )
mlir.symbol-table: ListItem ( "Adder" ) |-> .OpResults = "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : %0 , %1 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , %arg1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "x" , "y" , .AttributeValueList ] instanceName |-> "swap" moduleName |-> @Swap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "result1" , "result2" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) %2 , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %0 , %1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input a : i8 , input b : i8 , output res : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc4 , #loc5 , #loc6 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Adder" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) ListItem ( "Swap" ) |-> .OpResults = "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %arg1 , %arg0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input xx : i8 , input yy : i8 , output result1 : i8 , output result2 : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc , #loc1 , #loc2 , #loc3 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Swap" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types )
